title: SCOPE DECISION (gate on B0015–B0019 spec promotion)
why: The backlog now spans 6 strategic work-streams (B0015 alt-data, B0016 H4+costs, B0017 event-driven, B0018 spreads, B0019b portfolio audit impl, B0009/B0010 multi-asset H4 methodology). Project memory authorizes "XAU D1 → multi-asset H4" as direction; it does NOT authorize 6 parallel work-streams. Without an explicit cap, the backlog functions as TODO inflation that the orchestrator cannot resist mining each session.
scope: write `docs/superpowers/specs/<date>-edge-search-scope-decision.md` choosing **AT MOST 2** of {B0015 alt-data, B0016 H4+costs, B0017 event-driven, B0018 spreads, B0019b portfolio} as active work-streams. Remaining items stay `status: proposed (deferred by B0000)`. Resolve before any of B0015–B0019b promotes to spec.
